Location.title: Location
Location.subtitle: Address
Location.magazinos: ELS MAGAZINOS is Dènia's vibrant gastronomic and cultural marketplace. Spanning over 3,000 square meters with more than 20 stalls, we're not just large, we're also approachable. We believe in fostering connections by highlighting the faces behind the produce, the art, and the culinary creations that make our marketplace come alive.

About.about: In 1983, as Argentina embraced democracy, on December 10th, our culinary journey began. Over the years, we've flourished, now boasting five restaurants across La Plata, Ginnet, City Bell, and Los Hornos. We pioneered delivery services in the capital city of Buenos Aires, selling over 10,000 pizzas and 7,000 dozens of empanadas. With a dedicated team of 65 employees, we expanded to Paterna, introducing Allora Heron City to great success. And, of course, we couldn't miss out on Denia, a UNESCO-designated Creative City of Gastronomy. Our offerings span three distinct concepts within Els Magazinos market: Allora, specializing in empanadas and sandwiches; Patagonia, offering gourmet Argentine grills; and Fayiz, dedicated to authentic Arabic cuisine.
About.Patagonia: At our establishment, we are true masters of meat, just like any good Argentine. Here, you will enjoy incredibly tender meats thanks to a meticulous 10-hour cooking process. Our meats first receive a strong burst of heat to achieve a crispy crust, then we lower the temperature to 100º for a prolonged cook that ensures an unparalleled texture. \n All our meats are sourced directly from Ondara and cut in the traditional Argentine style, specifically for us. Our standout cuts include entraña (skirt steak), molleja (sweetbreads), carrillada (cheeks), and bondiola (pork shoulder). Each dish is accompanied by exquisite homemade sauces made with Diania oils, such as chimichurri, mustard, and a delicious orange reduction. \n Come and enjoy a unique culinary experience that highlights the best of Argentine tradition in every bite.
About.Allora: Indulge in the authentic flavors of Argentina, crafted fresh every day with artisanal care. Our star empanadas boast enticing fillings such as onion and provolone, pork and plum, beef and roasted vegetables, or mozzarella and mixed veggies - a tantalizing array to suit every palate. But that's just the beginning. Delve deeper into our menu and discover a fusion of Argentine and Mediterranean influences, where traditional recipes meet innovative twists. Take, for instance, our beloved molletes stuffed with succulent shredded beef, slow-cooked for eight hours to tender perfection, a testament to our dedication to flavor and quality. Each bite is a journey through the rich culinary heritage of both Argentina and the Mediterranean, offering a unique gastronomic experience that's sure to leave a lasting impression.
About.Fayiz: Eastern Mediterranean cuisine…Especially from Lebanon. The Lebanese immigrants to Argentina were linked to our childhood and we shared their customs and foods. There is an indelible memory in the palate of childhood. How can you not remember the baked kepe, rice with angel hair and cinnamon, grape leaf hiabra with meat and rice, and grandmother's cornstarch mantecados with walnuts... Pedro's childhood memories. You can eat the following dishes: Tabbule salad, hummus, fingers, falaces, cheese/chicken, French fries, onion rings, sliced kebab, durum, chicken/beef kebab, feta cheese, falafel.
